arts.ttl: Arsenal in advanced talks to sign Edu sporting director replacement, who was linked with Real Madrid
arts.sum: Arenal are reportedly in advanced talks to replace Edu with highly respected Real Sociedad sporting director Roberto Olabe.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid are 'targeting THREE Premier League stars to replace Toni Kroos' - including a shock Liverpool star
arts.sum: Real Madrid are ramping up their hunt for a replacement for Toni Kroos and have identified three Premier League stars as targets. Kroos retired from the game earlier this year.

arts.ttl: Will Jude Bellingham be available for Real Madrid vs Athletic Club?
arts.sum: An early insight into the status of Real Madrid star Jude Bellingham for the club’s upcoming meeting with Athletic Club has this evening been provided. This comes, for those who…

Rodrygo Goes returned from injury to feature in Carlo Ancelotti’s starting XI in Real Madrid ’s 2 - 0 win over Getafe at the Bernabeu on Sunday afternoon. As we delve into more and more video content, we’ll also be keeping it in mind to make player comps after games — both Real Madrid at the club level as well as its players on international duty.

arts.ttl: Demanding December schedule awaits Ancelotti and Real Madrid
arts.sum: The Champions League is back on the agenda for ‘Los Blancos’ and Bergamo is the next destination mid-month as Madrid will be looking to bounce back in the competition against high flying Atlanta who are currently fifth in the standings. Madrid are set to play six games across three competitions during December with two tricky away tests imminent in the league as they head to Bilbao midweek before travelling to Girona next weekend.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti explains Endrick’s Real Madrid absence vs Getafe
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has provided an explanation for his decision not to make use of youngster Endrick in the club’s latest outing. Real are of course fresh…

arts.ttl: ‘MVP’ – Fede Valverde hails unsung Real Madrid hero after Getafe victory
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Federico Valverde has taken to social media on Sunday evening, to reveal his appreciation for the efforts of teammate Dani Ceballos. This comes owing to his display…

Carlo Ancelotti praised "dangerous" Kylian Mbappé after he scored a stunning goal in Real Madrid's 2-0 win over Getafe on Sunday, saying "that's what we want from him" after the forward faced criticism for his recent displays.

arts.ttl: European football: McTominay boosts Napoli title bid, Real Madrid sink Getafe
arts.sum: Midfielder nets winner in 1-0 victory at Torino Bellingham and Mbappé on target for Madrid Scott McTominay’s first-half goal earned leaders Napoli a 1-0 win at Torino as Antonio Conte’s side opened a four-point gap at the top of the Serie A standings. The Scotland midfielder found the net around the half-hour mark when he struck a shot powerfully inside the near post after receiving a precise pass from Khvicha Kvaratskhelia. Napoli move on to 32 points, with four teams level on 28 points: Atalanta, Lazio, Inter and Fiorentina. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Player Ratings: Real Madrid 2 - 0 Getafe; 2024 La Liga
arts.sum: Finished the game with 110 touches, 89/95 passes completed, 6/8 long balls, was fouled 3 times, had 3 tackles, 2 interceptions, and won 7 of 10 ground duels. Mbappé—6: Scored a brilliant goal from outside the box, curling his shot to the back post leaving the goalkeeper with no chance.
